context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent can recognize when a global content search is the right tool, identify the best matching book from the results, and justify the answer with fixture evidence.

checklist.name: uses global content search appropriately
checklist.description: Uses a global content search flow because the title is not known up front.

checklist.name: identifies the correct book
checklist.description: Correctly identifies 'The Communist Manifesto' by Karl Marx and Friedrich Engels and reports its real book_id.

checklist.name: provides evidence from results
checklist.description: Includes a snippet or concise explanation showing that the match comes from the fixture search results rather than prior knowledge.

checklist.name: brief method explanation
checklist.description: Briefly explains which script or command was used.
